minting_now.name: Stop Doing This
minting_now.description:
# STOP DOING THIS

*A decentralized reaction system for the modern internet.*

Mint this NFT when you are tired of low-effort digital noise.

* Pixel collections
* Bot-driven engagement
* Empty hype cycles
* Recycled ideas dressed as innovation

But don’t just mint it.

Send it to the one who should

minting_now.name: Arcane Whispers
minting_now.description:
走进“奥法低语”（Arcane Whispers）的暗影世界——这是一个独特且充满神秘色彩的 NFT 交易卡牌系列，带您探寻远古传说中那些被遗忘的角落。该系列以一个隐秘教团为主角，成员涵盖了守护者、法师与探求者，他们毕生致力于掌控晦涩魔法并守护远古秘密。

每一枚“奥法低语” NFT 都是一件数字遗物，持有它即可获得一款正在开发中的策略性奥法卡牌游戏的参与资格。这些卡牌不仅承载着精美的艺术设计，更拥有植根于隐秘学、密码学及被遗忘仪式的隐藏属性与技能。持有者将解锁专属特权，包括 Pre-Alpha 测试资格、早期游戏背景故事，以及侧重于解密挑战和解锁游戏生态内隐藏奖励的社区活动。

minting_now.name: Farryfaces
minting_now.description: 首款以AI创作的“世界面孔”为特色的收藏卡牌游戏。

minting_now.name: Donate for Good cause
minting_now.description: No scam mint, Just raising Funds 3000$ for a Good cause

minting_now.name: Forsaken Vanguard
minting_now.description: FORSAKEN VANGUARD 🏴‍☠️  3000 Forsaken souls haunting the Mainnet.

minting_now.name: JellyMen
minting_now.description: 2222 semi-translucent companions oozing across Ethereum — built around original lore, 140 traits, and a small puddle of love.

minting_now.name: Boardwalk Club
minting_now.description: Boardwalk Club collection has 800 limited edition NFTs. Beach Club has 720 while the rarer Founders Club has 80. Boardwalk Club collection is designed as a digital tool for active participants in the Boardwalk ecosystem.

minting_now.name: Dirty Ghost Club
minting_now.description:
Dirty Ghost Club is not just another NFT project — it’s a movement.

A collection built for collectors, traders, and outsiders who live beyond the algorithm. Each piece carries its own identity, its own attitude — made to be owned, traded, and flexed.

But this goes beyond digital.

Dirty Ghost Club

minting_now.name: Collectr
minting_now.description:
Monthly Art on Base - Discover our stunning editions published monthly to bring awareness to the global community. With crosschain accessibility and credit card support, we make it easy for anyone to begin their own global art collecting journey.

Created with love by [Kusari](https://kusari.org).

minting_now.name: Apes Bunitori Club
minting_now.description:
Welcome to the Apes Bunitori Club! 🐒
Apes Bunitori Club is a unique NFT collection bringing together an exclusive community of collectors and digital art enthusiasts. Each ape is one of a kind, featuring distinctive traits that combine creativity and bold design.

🌟 Why choose this collection?

minting_now.description: Mutants On Base | MAPE is an exclusive NFT collection featuring 3,333 uniquely designed digital apes, hosted on the Ape blockchain. We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

Azuki is heading to Licensing Expo Las Vegas. With a trading card game, an upcoming manga, and Shao at the heart of it all - we'll be on the floor with the world's biggest IPs. Testing a new ink and dip pens this morning. Been a while since I touched traditional medium, shaky ahh hands.  Azuki 5567 |

May the 4th be with you Quick Azuki updates  Azuki TCG US distribution live with PHD Games and GTS. Biggest LGS distributors. [Collect.anime.xyz](https://t.co/TJjc8MgDkJ) claw machine by is restocked again. New Grails added.  Azuki TCG discord tourney for new players: 29 entrants, 4+ hours of gameplay.
Azuki IP expansion is in full effect. Ask your local game store to order Azuki TCG today. Official Azuki TCG

Azuki TCG is now stocked through PHD Games and GTS Distribution. These two distributors put Magic, Pokémon, One Piece, and other major TCGs on shelves across the US. Want us at your shop on launch day? Tell your shop to preorder through PHD or GTS. To all the new players and holders joining Azuki: Welcome to the Garden
